verified_claim: Warcraft III: Reforged 2.0 makes health bars and cooldown numbers always-on by default while retaining lower-priority telemetry as optional and provides HUD scaling.
applicability: Persistent fight-critical health/readiness/progress with optional diagnostic telemetry is universal; Warcraft's unit art and race vocabulary are title-specific.
battle_screen_implication: Keep loss condition, current threat, objective progress, selected force order, and command readiness persistent. Move verbose operation diagnostics and asset status into an optional detail view; support readable enlarged/high-contrast text independently of surface texture.
anti_pattern: Forcing the player to read a side rail or open details to learn the active threat, objective, or next command.
acceptance_criterion: At both desktop and mobile widths, a player can identify the loss condition, active threat, current objective, and next legal command without opening operational detail.
